benchmark_unit: whole transcript -> final note quality score
purpose: Define the private reviewer attestation record coordinators must complete before accepting independent clinician ratings into a validation evidence run.

required_attestations.private_evidence: source registration check retained by coordinator
training and anchor-case completion retained by coordinator
reviewer confirms candidate source and prompt strategy are hidden
reviewer confirms comments must not include patient, clinician, reviewer, provider, registration, phone, or email identifiers
reviewer confirms ratings are independent and based on the transcript plus blinded final note only
reviewer confirms disputed or ambiguous scoring should follow the adjudication workflow

coordinator_completion_rule: Set training_completed=yes and conflict_of_interest=none in the pseudonymous registry only after every required attestation is complete and retained privately.
claim_boundary: A completed reviewer attestation supports reviewer provenance and governance only. It is not itself validation evidence; validation claims require completed independent clinician ratings, reliability analysis, adjudicated consensus, and claim-readiness checks.
